title: oenothera novae-scotiae var. intermedia
intro: Oenothera novae-scotiae var. intermedia, also known as the Canadian evening primrose, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the willowherb family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Canadian evening primrose include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical ointment, and its root and leaves can be used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
